title: AN ACT CREATING THE BARRIO OF MAINIT IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF COMPOSTELA, PROVINCE OF DAVAO.

chunks.text:
H. No. 2281 / 51 OG No. 6, 2794 (June, 1955)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 1218, May 10, 1955 ]

AN ACT CREATING THE BARRIO OF MAINIT IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF COMPOSTELA, PROVINCE OF DAVAO.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The sitios of Mainit, Tagnocan and Cati-an in the barrio of Manat, Municipality of Compostela, Province of Davao, are hereby separated from the said barrio of Manat and constituted into a barrio to be known as the barrio of Mainit.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Approved, May 10, 1955.
